title: Gifts2U Hairdressing Set Age 3+ for Kids, Hairdressing Toy Set with Hair Dryer, Barber Costume Apron, Stylist Accessories for Girls -8 (classic)

Realistic Kids Hairdresser Set- This pretend hair kit for girls simulates a realistic scenario. This battery operation hairdryer makes a sound and blows just like a real hair dryer. ( Note: 2 x AAA batteries required. Not included). Made from high quality ABS plastic, this play kit is lightweight. Your child can easily play this hairdresser toy set.

My First Styling Kit-Children like to imitate adults dressing up. This adorable educational toys is suitable for your girl to invite friends to play the game together. Exercise children's imagination, hand-eye coordination and social skills . Keep your child entertained for hours, improve their practical skills and beauty perception.

Suitcase-Giving full play to their creativity and innovation. Kids can easily organize all the accessories in the case and carry this salon set along on trips and playdates with friends and allows them to like professional stylists.

Great Gift Idea-Your kids will love pulling together stylish hairdos for themselves, siblings, friends, and family. Great for pretend play fashion and style, kids hairdresser, gift idea for Birthday, Holiday, kids' Halloween Costumes, Christmas. Accessories in the set are specifically designed with smooth, rounded edges.
